parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  status: 'error',
  workflowId: $json.workflowId,
  workflowName: $json.workflowName,
  executionId: $json.executionId,
  executionUrl: $json.executionUrl,
  lastNodeExecuted: $json.lastNodeExecuted,
  mode: $json.mode,
  message: $json.message,
  stack: $json.stack,
  timestamp: $json.timestamp
} }}
